name: liblist-utilsby-perl
title: liblist-utilsby-perl
description:
higher-order list utility functions
List::UtilsBy provides a number of list utility functions, all of which take
an initial code block to control their behaviour. They are variations on
similar core perl or List::Util functions of similar names, but which use the
block to control their behaviour.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use liblist-utilsby-perl because higher-order list utility functions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use liblist-utilsby-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair liblist-utilsby-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `liblist-utilsby-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
